assertions.description: All 8 QSFP differential pairs (TX1_P/N, TX2_P/N, TX3_P/N, TX4_P/N, RX1_P/N, RX2_P/N, RX3_P/N, RX4_P/N) are correctly identified with has_esd=True referencing U1 (SRV05-4 equivalent). Pair naming matches the U.FL connector net names exactly.

U2 (TPS562201) identified as switching topology with input=+12V, output=+3V3, R1=33k2/R2=10k feedback divider, estimated Vout=2.592V (close to 3.3V with Vref=0.6V). C9 DNP compensation cap on FB net correctly noted in mid_point_connections.
